title: Assign item automatically using other board
excerpt:
Looking for some automation to assign item automatically in new boards, using another existing board with list of items & persons. 
Need immediate assistance, project deadline is Monday.

posts.author: Ekta.Garg (Ekta Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for some automation to assign item automatically in new boards, using another existing board with list of items & persons.
Need immediate assistance, project deadline is Monday.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Ekta.Garg ,
Do you mean to copy the items from one board to the other? If so, you can check out the Duplicates and Uniques app. Here is a video that demonstrates how the copy functionality works.

posts.author: Ekta.Garg (Ekta Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, I mean if I have a list of allocation of items to respective users/persons. I add that as a board say allocation board.
Now, whenever I create new board with same items (for other tasks) it should assign to person automatically referring the allocation board.
Hope it is clear. Please assist

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Check out the Vlookup app then.
